title: cystopteris alpina
intro: Cystopteris alpina, also known as Alpine Cystopteris or Alpine Wood Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Cystopteridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cystopteris alpina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. Cystopteris alpina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
